memories.label: quasar_authority
memories.content: Project Quasar stores durable narrative memory in PostgreSQL; generated lexical indexes are rebuildable projections.

memories.label: cedar_rollback
memories.content: The Cedar rollback drill restores lexical-only recall before optional client vectors are repopulated.

memories.label: ember_sensitive
memories.content: The synthetic Ember vault marker is opal 739 and must remain redacted in broad recall.

memories.label: maple_distractor
memories.content: The Maple cache exercise records ordinary service observations without discussing Quasar or Cedar procedures.
